You drink a flask of water. It tastes g: They're like stalagmites, but they go the other way.

You drink a flask of water. It tastes g: Boy, that smarts!  Your last thoughts, although trivial, gently loft you toward infinity.  "I wonder if the bear's paws were clean.........."

You drink a flask of water. It tastes g: Look pets...we have a visitor!

Powers of Night,

You drink a flask of water. It tastes g: Ooooh...yummy!  I'm glad you returned.

You drink a flask of water. It tastes g: Hear me, Oh Element of Air and Wind.\nGive me the power to save my own skin.
